caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with an emblem, and grey over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain around his neck and bracelets on both wrists. Behind him is a white wall featuring a banner with gold stars and the repeated phrase "GRIND HUSTLE". To his right, red text reads "BOSS TALK 101". On the bottom left and right of the scene, logos appear with the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". He gestures with both hands while speaking, moving from a position where he points outward with his fingers in the first few frames to a posture where he brings his hands closer to his chest, subtly shifting his head and shoulders. His t-shirt features a graphic with the legible text "CHECK IT".
